protected_group_scope.human_readable: LC11 v5.0 certifies only the declared per-attribute protected-group controls for gender, and race. It does not certify absence of bias for uncovered ECOA/Reg B bases (color, religion, national origin, marital status, age, receipt of public assistance, and exercise of consumer-credit rights) or for intersectional combinations.

LC11 v5.0 certifies only the declared per-attribute protected-group controls for gender, and race. It does not certify absence of bias for uncovered ECOA/Reg B bases (color, religion, national origin, marital status, age, receipt of public assistance, and exercise of consumer-credit rights) or for intersectional combinations.

validation_results.business_value: Demonstrates achievable fairness baseline under configured screening thresholds (not a compliance determination)

minimal_bias.message: Minimal bias achieved under configured screening thresholds

source_to_synthetic_feature_anchor_diagn.message: Source-to-synthetic feature-anchor drift recorded for review; this is diagnostic and does not yet prove anchor preservation

pre_label_representation.message: Intrinsic pre-label slice satisfied: source-to-synthetic protected-group ratio preservation plus coarse source-to-synthetic anchor-profile preservation and supporting diagnostics

warnings: Low coverage score - model may not be capturing full data distribution
